creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
Upgrade the lesstif port from 0.88.1 to 0.88.9.
The enclosed uuencoded gzip tar file contains 2
uunecode files: (1) the unadulterated lesstif directory
from my private port collection and (2) a gzip diff 
between my private lesstif directory and the one in the
official ports tree.  Why 2 file?  Search the GNATS
database.
